# Simone Nigro - Full-Stack Developer

> Portfolio personale di Simone Nigro, full-stack developer italiano (Avellino, Campania) in
> ACCA software S.p.A. Autore di librerie open source Angular e Node.js pubblicate su npm con
> oltre 76.000 download al mese. Sviluppa per il web dal 2000. Contributor
> del core di WordPress (5.5). Sito bilingue: italiano su /, inglese su /en/. Il sito espone i
> propri contenuti anche via WebMCP (navigator.modelContext): get_profile,
> list_open_source_projects, list_articles, get_contacts.

## Profilo

- Ruolo: Full-Stack Developer (Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, PostgreSQL)
- Azienda: ACCA software S.p.A.
- Località: Avellino, Campania, Italia
- Formazione: Laurea in Scienze della Comunicazione, Università degli Studi di Salerno
- Email: nigro.simone@gmail.com

## Progetti open source (dati npm/GitHub del 21/07/2026)

- [ng-http-caching](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-http-caching): Cache for HTTP requests in Angular application. — 14.520 download/mese, 53 stelle
- [ng-let](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-let): Angular structural directive for sharing data as local variable into html component template. — 50.263 download/mese, 47 stelle
- [ng-simple-state](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-simple-state): Simple state management in Angular with only Services and Signal. — 749 download/mese, 46 stelle
- [ng-for-track-by-property](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-for-track-by-property): Angular global trackBy property directive with strict type checking. — 1254 download/mese, 28 stelle
- [ng-generic-pipe](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-generic-pipe): Generic pipe for Angular application for use a component method into component template — 4986 download/mese, 20 stelle
- [codice-fiscale](https://packagist.org/packages/nigrosimone/codicefiscale): Libreria PHP per la validazione dei Codici Fiscali italiani a 16 caratteri con supporto per l'omocodia — 15 stelle
- [ng-lock](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-lock): Angular decorator for lock a function and user interface while a task running. — 469 download/mese, 9 stelle
- [ng-as](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-as): Angular pipe and directive for type casting template variables. — 3698 download/mese, 8 stelle
- [postgres-benchmarks](https://github.com/nigrosimone/postgres-benchmarks): A benchmark focusing on the performance of Postgres client libraries for Node.js, brianc/node-postgres VS porsager/postgres — 4 stelle
- [turbo-array](https://www.npmjs.com/package/turbo-array): Turbo Array is a lightweight, high-performance library that allows you to build lazy evaluation pipelines for arrays. It supports operations like filter, map, reduce, forEach, and join, executing them efficiently.  A method build with Turbo Array is 4x faster than vanilla version. — 29 download/mese, 2 stelle
- [express-fast-json-stringify](https://www.npmjs.com/package/express-fast-json-stringify): With express-fast-json-stringify, you can leverage fast-json-stringify in your Express application to improve JSON serialization performance — 56 download/mese, 1 stella
- Totale: 9 pacchetti npm, 76.024 download/mese, 263 stelle GitHub
